health_conditions: history of grand mal seizures (approximately 15 over substance abuse period)
prior heavy drug and alcohol abuse (6 years sober)

benefits.description: Intended to heal drug-induced damage from prior substance abuse

side_effects.description: Overstimulated, tense, wired sensation; head under pressure; internal stress response; not anxiety exactly but stress response; easily scared, more traumatic startle response
Jaw and brain felt locked and tense

protocol_notes: Tested three different brands from two different vendors across three separate occasions—same side effect occurred each time. Used bacteriostatic water from two different sources. Also uses omega-3 supplement (3g EPA+DHA daily). Sauna use at gym. Intended to titrate up very slowly over 5 months to reach normal dosing. Has not yet used CJC-1295/Ipamorelin mix due to anaphylaxis concerns. Experienced similar side effects previously at 1-2 IU/day dose, which persisted for weeks after cessation.
